core_principles: High contrast for critical signals (Value Bets)
Zero clutter - every pixel must serve a purpose

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(16,185,129,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 border border-zinc-700 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 hover:text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md transition-all

cards.base: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm p-5 rounded-lg hover:border-white/10 transition-colors
cards.highlight: bg-zinc-900/80 border border-emerald-500/30 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.05)] p-5 rounded-lg

badges.value: bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 border border-amber-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider
badges.live: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono rounded-sm animate-pulse
badges.probability: bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono rounded-sm

inputs.base: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500 text-sm rounded-md px-3 py-2 w-full transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600

style.tooltip: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 rounded-md shadow-xl

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to 'index.css' at the very top.
3. LAYOUT: Create a 'DashboardLayout' component that includes the Sidebar and Topbar. All dashboard pages must be wrapped in this.
4. DATA DISPLAY: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL odds, probabilities, and financial figures. Use 'Manrope' for team names and UI labels.
5. VALUE BETS: This is the core feature. Value bets must visually 'pop' using the Amber/Gold accent color and subtle glow effects.
6. MOBILE: Ensure the sidebar collapses to a hamburger menu on mobile. Tables must be scrollable horizontally on small screens.
7. SHADCN: Customize the default Shadcn components. Remove 'rounded-xl' and replace with 'rounded-md'. Change default borders to 'border-zinc-800'.
8. CHARTS: When implementing charts, ensure the X/Y axis lines are subtle (#27272A) and the data lines are vibrant.
9. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for modals and sticky headers.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons. Use Lucide React icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
